name: Deluxe Chicken Supper
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 ounces condensed cream of celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in a skillet until crisp. Remove and drain on paper towels.
2. Crumble the bacon.
3. Saute onion, celery, green pepper, and mushrooms in bacon dripping until tender. Do not brown.
4. In a bowl, combine soup and sour cream. Add chicken, salt, Worcestershire sauce, pepper, 1 tablespoon milk, crumbled bacon, and sauteed vegetables. Mix well.
5. Turn the mixture into a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Combine biscuit mix, eggs, 1/2 cup milk, pimentos, and cheese in another bowl until just blended.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the biscuit mixture on top of the chicken mixture.
8. Bake in a moderate oven at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until biscuits are golden.
Makes 6-8 servings.
